extract: Not to be confused with Meteonite. The Meteorite (Japanese: いんせき Meteorite) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III. It is used in a variety of contexts in the core series games: In Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, FireRed, and LeafGreen, it has no effect on its own, instead being an item that the player can deliver to an NPC for a reward. In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire, it is fed to Rayquaza during the Delta Episode to enable it to Mega Evolve. In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet, it allows Deoxys to change between its four forms.
